name: ASCII Text
description: Renders text as ASCII character art on canvas. Mouse hover within a radius reveals solid text, with a smooth transition at the boundary.
accessibility_notes: text is rendered to canvas — not accessible to screen readers
provide an aria-label on the container

text.description: The text to render as ASCII art

fontSize.description: Font size of each ASCII character in pixels

charset.description: Characters used for brightness mapping, darkest to brightest

revealRadius.description: Radius of the mouse reveal zone in pixels

color.description: RGB color for the ASCII text, e.g. { r: 100, g: 220, b: 100 }

className.description: CSS class for the wrapper div

conflicts: canvas re-renders every frame — avoid multiple instances on one page
mouse-dependent reveal does not work on touch devices
usage_tip: Best for single hero heading; avoid on mobile or touch-only devices.
